name: hve-spielberg
description: AI-powered video production pipeline skill for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: hve-spielberg
plugins.description: End-to-end video production pipeline with design thinking. A 6-phase orchestrator (Discovery → Storytelling → Capture → Design → Production → Audio & Render) that turns your app into a polished promo, showcase, or tutorial video, rendered with HyperFrames (HTML + GSAP). Runs on Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.
